title: AquaXGaming
description: High-performance FPS boost modpack by Aqua X Gaming, designed for smooth and lag-free gameplay on all devices. Supports low-end PCs, high-end setups, and PojavLauncher, with optimized builds across multiple Minecraft versions.
body:
# 🌊 Aqua X FPS Boost Pack

Official performance modpack by **Aqua X Gaming** built to deliver **maximum FPS, smooth gameplay, and zero lag** across multiple Minecraft versions.

This project is not limited to just one release — it includes **optimized builds for different Minecraft versions**, so you can always choose the one that fits your setup best.

---

## 🚀 What is this pack?

Aqua X FPS Boost Pack is a **lightweight Fabric optimization modpack** designed for:
- Low-end PCs 🖥️  
- Mid-range setups ⚙️  
- High-end systems 🎮  
- Mobile users via **PojavLauncher** 📱  

No matter your device, the goal is simple:  
**Better FPS, faster loading, and smoother gameplay**

---

## ⚡ Key Features

- 🔥 Huge FPS boost (up to 2x–5x improvement)
- 🧠 Smart optimization (CPU, RAM & GPU)
- 🌐 Multiplayer & server friendly
- 📱 PojavLauncher supported
- 🎨 Optional shaders support
- 🔄 Multiple Minecraft versions supported
- 🧩 Clean, minimal, and stable setup

---

## 📦 Versions Included

This project contains **multiple versions of the pack**, including:
- Latest builds (like 1.21.x series)
- Stable older versions for compatibility
- Continuously updated releases

Each version is tuned separately for **maximum performance and stability**

---

## 🔧 How to Use

1. Install the Modrinth App: https://modrinth.com/app  
2. Download your preferred version  
3. Import the `.mrpack` file  
4. Launch and enjoy smooth gameplay 🚀  

---

## 🌐 Official Links

- 🎥 YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC7jovJmIythI00QY1e5IyjA  
- 💬 Discord Community: https://discord.gg/96FstKJeFP  

Join the Discord for:
- Updates & new versions  
- Support & help  
- Community events  
- Direct interaction with the creator  

---

## 🔒 Safety & Reliability

- No malware or hidden files  
- Only trusted mods used  
- Clean Modrinth format  
- Regular updates & improvements  

---

## ❤️ Credits

All mods belong to their respective developers.  
This modpack is carefully curated and optimized by **Aqua X Gaming** for the community.
